name: Legacy Fallback (auto)
description: Catch-all tail template that mirrors the historical hardcoded matchProviderByPattern routing — runs only when no explicit per-task or active template returned a chain. Each category lists the providers that the old hardcoded code preferred for that intent. Operators can edit, disable, or replace this template like any other; it is not given any special standing beyond running last in the template chain. Categories with empty chains intentionally fall through to the next routing stage (complexity / legacy DB rules / default provider).
